title: DPad Wait / Rest Mechanic
problem: The DPad center button (wait) was wired up in DPad.tsx but the GridScreen handler only triggered haptics — no actual game effect. Players had no way to recover HP or mana on the grid outside of potions.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred mechanic: long-press handler exists but the turn-skip action was explicitly not implemented

analysis: DPad.tsx exposes onWait via onLongPress on the center button. GridScreen passed an onWait stub that did only haptics. gridStore already tracked stamina, and gameStore had healPlayer/restoreMana. The mechanic just needed wiring: consume 2 stamina, heal 4% max HP, restore 3 mana, show a toast. If stamina < 2, block with a warning toast instead.
implementation: GridScreen.tsx: replaced the onWait stub with a full handler. Reads gridStore.stamina — if < 2, fires a warning toast and returns. Otherwise: drainStamina(2), healPlayer(restHeal = max(3, round(playerMaxHp * 0.04))), restoreMana(3), haptics.impactLight(), shows a green toast '+{restHeal} HP · +3 MP' for 1.8s. Toast state tracked with useState + useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>.

decisions.decision: Cost 2 stamina per rest — blocks resting when exhausted
decisions.rationale: Without a cost, players would spam wait to full-heal between every encounter. Stamina creates a meaningful trade-off between exploring and recovering.

decisions.decision: Heal 4% max HP, restore 3 mana (not flat numbers)
decisions.rationale: Percentage-based heal scales with character progression. 3 mana is flat and intentionally small to prevent abuse.

successCriteria: Pressing wait on the DPad costs 2 stamina, heals 4% max HP, restores 3 MP, and shows a toast. When stamina < 2, a warning toast appears and nothing changes.
knownLimitations: No animation — recovery is shown as a text toast only
Cannot rest during encounters — the DPad is not rendered in CombatScreen
Rest does not pass time so there is no time-based opportunity cost beyond stamina
userGuide: Long-press the center DPad button to rest. Costs 2 stamina. Heals ~4% of your max HP and restores 3 mana. If stamina < 2 you cannot rest.
implementationNotes: restToast state + restToastTimer ref in GridScreen — same pattern as stakeToast
healPlayer and restoreMana are gameStore actions; drainStamina is gridStore
Toast visible for 1800ms, cleared on next rest attempt to avoid overlap

codeSnippets.label: Rest handler in GridScreen onWait

revisions.author: claude
revisions.reason: Initial feature definition — rest mechanic implemented this session
